title: Sign out ends session and protected route access requires sign-in
description: Verifies that signing out ends the session and that attempting to access a protected module requires authentication.

title: Session remains active while navigating across multiple protected modules
description: Verifies basic session persistence by navigating to multiple authenticated pages without being sent back to sign-in.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation menu
Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation menu

title: Global dashboard loads and shows core KPI cards
description: Verifies the central dashboard loads after login and displays high-level KPI cards for key modules.

title: Overdue tasks KPI is visible on the dashboard
description: Verifies the overdue tasks KPI card is present and can be identified on the global dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "Overdue tasks KPI card" is visible

title: Expand overdue tasks KPI to view overdue task list
description: Verifies clicking the overdue tasks KPI expands details and shows a list of overdue tasks.

steps.description: Verify element "Overdue tasks details list" is visible

title: Overdue task link from expanded details navigates to Operations module
description: Verifies selecting a task link from the overdue tasks details takes the user to the Operations (/operacional) module.

steps.description: Verify element "Overdue tasks details list" is visible
Click the first visible overdue task link in the details list

title: KPI widgets show loading spinners while data is fetched
description: Verifies the dashboard shows loading indicators for KPI widgets during slow loading.

steps.description: Verify element "KPI loading spinner" is visible
Wait for the KPI widgets to finish loading
Verify element "KPI loading spinner" is not visible

title: Create a new deal and see it appear on the Comercial kanban
description: Verifies a user can create a new deal from the Comercial page and the new deal card appears on the board.

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation

title: Comercial board shows all expected kanban columns
description: Verifies the Comercial page loads and displays the main pipeline columns (Prospecting, Negotiation, Won, Lost).

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation

title: Create deal flow opens modal and requires required fields (happy-path save)
description: Verifies the create-deal modal opens, required fields can be filled, and saving closes the form and returns to the board.

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation
Click on the "Create new deal" button

title: Assign a user to a deal after moving it to Negotiation
description: Verifies that after a deal is moved to Negotiation, a user can be assigned and an assignee indicator appears on the card.

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation
Click on a deal card in the "Negotiation" column
Select an option from the "Assignee" dropdown
Verify element "assignee avatar on the deal card" is visible

title: Create new client validation blocks save when required field is empty
description: Verifies client creation shows a validation message when required data is missing and the form remains open.

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation
Click on the "Create new client" button

title: Cancel out of create-deal modal without saving
description: Verifies the user can dismiss the new deal form and return to the kanban without creating a card.

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation
Click on the "Create new deal" button

title: Comercial page loads and displays kanban board container
description: Verifies the Comercial route loads successfully and the primary kanban board area is visible for interaction.

steps.description: Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation

title: Create a new transaction and verify it appears in the transactions list
description: Verifies a user can create a transaction from Financeiro and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Financeiro shows transactions list and cashflow/summary KPIs on load
description: Verifies the Financeiro landing view renders the transaction list and a cashflow/summary section.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation
Verify text "Fluxo de Caixa" is visible

title: Create transaction from Financeiro using minimal required fields
description: Verifies saving a new transaction succeeds when only required fields are filled and it appears in the list.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Delete a transaction successfully via custom confirmation modal
description: Verifies deleting a transaction shows an in-app warning modal and, upon confirmation, removes the transaction and shows a success message.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation
Click on the delete button for a transaction in the list

title: Cancel transaction deletion from the warning modal
description: Verifies the user can cancel from the custom delete confirmation modal and the transaction remains visible.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation
Click on the delete button for a transaction in the list
Click on the "Cancel" button in the warning modal

title: Open Recorrências view from Financeiro
description: Verifies the user can navigate from Financeiro to the Recorrências view and see the recurring payments list area.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Create a new recurring payment (Recorrência) and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can create a recurring schedule and see it listed in Recorrências.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Validate required fields on Create Recorrência form
description: Verifies the recurring payment form blocks saving and shows a visible validation message when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Attempt to save a transaction with missing required fields and verify validation feedback
description: Verifies the Create Transaction form prevents saving when required fields are empty and displays a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Financeiro" in the main navigation

title: Open Operacional kanban and start creating a new task
description: Verifies the Operacional page loads with kanban columns and the new task modal can be opened.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu

title: Operacional page shows all expected kanban columns
description: Verifies the kanban board renders the standard columns for operational tasks.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu

title: Create a new operational task with title, description, and assignee
description: Verifies a task can be created and appears as a new card on the kanban board.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu
Type "E2E Task - Operacional" into the task title field
Type "Created by automated UI test" into the task description field
Click on the assignees dropdown field
Type "a" into the assignees search/filter field
Click on the first assignee option in the filtered list
Verify text "E2E Task - Operacional" is visible

title: Validation: prevent saving a task when title is empty, then correct and save
description: Verifies title-required validation is shown and the task can be saved after fixing the title.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the assignees dropdown field
Click on the first assignee option in the list
Verify text "Title is required" is visible
Type "E2E Task - Title Fixed" into the task title field
Verify text "E2E Task - Title Fixed" is visible

title: Cancel task creation closes the modal without adding a card
description: Verifies dismissing the creation modal does not create a new task card.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu
Type "E2E Task - Should Not Save" into the task title field
Verify text "Create Task" is not visible
Verify text "E2E Task - Should Not Save" is not visible

title: Delivery Radar shows tasks due soon and opens task details from highlight
description: Verifies Delivery Radar highlights near-deadline tasks and clicking opens task detail with deadline health.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu
Click on the first highlighted task in the Delivery Radar list
Verify element "Deadline health visualization" is visible

title: Delivery Radar empty state when no tasks are due within 3 days (if applicable)
description: Verifies an appropriate empty or non-highlight state is shown when there are no near-deadline tasks.

steps.description: Click on "Operacional" in the main navigation/menu
Verify text "No tasks due soon" is visible

title: Create a new meeting and verify it appears in Scheduled column
description: Verifies a user can create a meeting from Administrativo and sees it listed under Scheduled.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: Save meeting with required details and verify it is listed in Scheduled
description: Verifies meeting creation requires details, saves successfully, and shows the meeting in the Scheduled column.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation
Type "E2E Meeting - Scheduled" into the meeting title field

title: Demand creation shows validation errors when required fields are empty
description: Verifies demand creation enforces required fields and displays validation messages when saving empty form.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation

title: Fix validation errors and save demand successfully
description: Verifies a user can complete missing required fields after validation errors and save a demand successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Administrativo" in the main navigation
Type "E2E Demand - Validation Fix" into the demand title field
Verify text "E2E Demand - Validation Fix" is visible

title: Update collaborator permission: toggle Diretório module access and save
description: Verifies an admin can edit a collaborator’s permissions and successfully save a change to Diretório access.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Click on a collaborator entry in the list

title: Deactivate collaborator with custom confirmation modal
description: Verifies a collaborator can be deactivated only after confirming in the custom modal and the status becomes inactive.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Click the "Deactivate" button for a collaborator
Click the "Confirm" button in the confirmation modal

title: Cancel collaborator deactivation from confirmation modal
description: Verifies the deactivation modal can be dismissed and the collaborator remains active when cancellation is chosen.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Click the "Deactivate" button for a collaborator
Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation modal

title: Search client by name and open subscription lifecycle details
description: Verifies client search filters results and a client record shows subscription lifecycle and mensalidades information.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Type "Acme" into the client search field
Click on the client named "Acme" in the results

title: Search yields no results state
description: Verifies the directory shows a clear empty state when the search query matches no clients or collaborators.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Type "zzzz-nonexistent-client" into the client search field

title: Delete client: cancel from confirmation modal leaves client intact
description: Verifies canceling the delete confirmation modal does not delete the client and returns to a stable UI state.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Click on a client entry in the list
Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation modal

title: Permissions edit: discard changes by leaving without saving
description: Verifies toggling a permission without saving does not show a success message and the user can exit the editor safely.

steps.description: Click on "Diretório" in the main navigation
Click on a collaborator entry in the list
Verify text "Permissions updated" is not visible

title: Create a new calendar event from a day cell and confirm it appears on the month grid
description: Verifies a user can create an event via the calendar cell modal flow and see the new event displayed on the calendar.

steps.description: Click on "Calendário" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Month calendar grid" is visible
Click on a day cell in the month grid that is currently visible
Verify element "Event creation modal" is visible
Type "E2E New Event" into the "Title" field
Verify text "E2E New Event" is visible

title: Cancel event creation from the modal and ensure no new event is added
description: Verifies dismissing event creation does not add an event to the calendar grid.

steps.description: Click on "Calendário" in the main navigation menu
Click on a day cell in the month grid that is currently visible
Verify element "Event creation modal" is visible
Type "E2E Cancelled Event" into the "Title" field
Verify element "Event creation modal" is not visible

title: Create event validation: attempt to save with missing required title
description: Verifies the modal prevents saving when required fields are empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Calendário" in the main navigation menu
Click on a day cell in the month grid that is currently visible
Verify element "Event creation modal" is visible

title: Send a message in an existing conversation and see it appear in the thread
description: Verifies a user can open a recent conversation, send a message, and see it appear in message history.

steps.description: Click on "Chat" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first conversation in the recent conversations list
Type "E2E test message - existing conversation" into the message input field
Verify text "E2E test message - existing conversation" is visible

title: Create a new conversation, send the first message, and verify it appears in recents
description: Verifies a user can start a new conversation, send an initial message, and see the conversation added to the recent list.

steps.description: Click on "Chat" in the main navigation menu
Select the first available recipient from the recipient list
Type "Hello from E2E - new conversation" into the message input field
Verify text "Hello from E2E - new conversation" is visible
Click the "Back" control within the chat UI to return to the conversation list
Verify text "Hello from E2E - new conversation" is visible in the recent conversations list

title: Chat page loads and shows recent conversations list
description: Verifies the Chat landing page renders and shows the list of recent conversations for a logged-in user.

steps.description: Click on "Chat" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Recent conversations list" is visible

title: Opening a conversation shows message history and message composer
description: Verifies that selecting a conversation opens the thread view with history and a message input area.

steps.description: Click on "Chat" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first conversation in the recent conversations list
Verify element "Message input field" is visible

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the user cannot send a blank message and receives visible feedback or the send action is disabled.

steps.description: Click on "Chat" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first conversation in the recent conversations list
Verify text "Message cannot be empty" is visible

title: Starting a new conversation requires selecting a recipient
description: Verifies the UI blocks sending the first message until a recipient is selected.

steps.description: Click on "Chat" in the main navigation menu
Type "First message without recipient" into the message input field
Verify text "Select a recipient" is visible

title: Open an unread notification and navigate to its related module
description: Verifies that clicking an unread notification navigates to the related page and shows expected context on the destination screen.

steps.description: Click on "Notificações" in the main navigation
Click on the first visible unread notification in the list

title: Unread notifications list is visible with clear unread indicators
description: Verifies that the notifications center shows a visible list and indicates which items are unread.

steps.description: Click on "Notificações" in the main navigation

title: Mark all notifications as read resets unread count in the notifications center
description: Verifies that using "Mark all as read" updates the visible unread count/state within the notifications page.

steps.description: Click on "Notificações" in the main navigation
Click the "Mark all as read" button

title: Mark all as read shows success feedback in the UI
description: Verifies that the UI provides a visible confirmation after marking all notifications as read.

steps.description: Click on "Notificações" in the main navigation
Click the "Mark all as read" button

title: Clicking a notification can route to the Calendar module when applicable
description: Verifies that selecting a calendar-related notification navigates to the calendar page.

steps.description: Click on "Notificações" in the main navigation
Click on a visible notification whose text mentions "Calendário"

title: Notifications page loads and shows empty state when there are no notifications
description: Verifies that the notifications center gracefully displays an empty-state message when no notifications exist.

steps.description: Click on "Notificações" in the main navigation

title: Create a new template and verify it appears in the list
description: Verifies a user can create a template with subject and body and see it listed afterward.

steps.description: Type "E2E Template Subject - Alpha" into the Subject field
Type "E2E body content for Alpha template." into the Body field
Verify text "E2E Template Subject - Alpha" is visible

title: Validate required fields when creating a template (save with empty fields)
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving a template when required fields are missing.

title: Templates page loads and shows core sections (templates and useful links)
description: Verifies the Templates page renders expected core UI elements for templates and useful external sites.

title: Admin updates a role permissions and sees the update applied
description: Verifies an authenticated user can edit a role, save permission changes, and see the updated state reflected on the page.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click the "Edit" button for a role in the permissions list
Click to toggle one permission option (for example, a module access checkbox) to a different state

title: Cancel role permission edit does not change permissions
description: Verifies leaving an edit session without saving does not apply changes to role permissions.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click the "Edit" button for a role in the permissions list
Click to toggle one permission option to a different state
Click the "Cancel" or "Close" button in the edit UI
Verify text "Saved" or "Salvo" is not visible

title: Saving role permissions without changes keeps current state
description: Verifies saving an unchanged permissions form does not introduce unexpected modifications and still confirms completion.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click the "Edit" button for a role in the permissions list

title: Non-admin attempt to grant module access is blocked with access denied
description: Verifies the UI prevents permission escalation when the logged-in user lacks admin rights, showing an access denied message and blocking changes.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click the "Edit" button for a user or role module access entry
Click to enable a module access option that appears restricted
Verify text "Access denied" or "Acesso negado" is visible

title: Blocked permission change does not persist after refresh/navigation
description: Verifies that after an access denied attempt, the permission does not appear enabled when revisiting the Configurações page.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click the "Edit" button for a user or role module access entry
Click to enable a module access option that appears restricted
Verify text "Access denied" or "Acesso negado" is visible
Click on "Dashboard" or "Início" in the main navigation
Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Verify text "Access denied" or "Acesso negado" is not visible

title: Update a system category and see success toast
description: Verifies a category change can be saved from Configurações and the UI confirms with a visible success message/toast.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click into a system category field (name/label) in the categories panel
Type "Categoria Teste" into the category name/label field

title: Updated category is reflected in another module page
description: Verifies that after saving a category in Configurações, the updated category label is visible elsewhere in the app UI.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click into a system category field (name/label) in the categories panel
Type "Categoria Teste" into the category name/label field
Click on "Comercial" in the main navigation

title: Category save validation: empty category name is rejected
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving a system category when the category name is empty and shows a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Configurações" in the main navigation
Click into a system category name/label field in the categories panel
Press "Backspace" to clear the category name/label field
